fields.description: Freely editable label the staff sees (e.g. "Ravi", "Revenue Bot", "The Boss").
fields.label: Agent Name

fields.description: The template this agent was spawned from. Determines the default toolset, autonomy, and system prompt — but everything is editable afterwards.
fields.label: Persona
fields.options:
Front Desk Copilot
Revenue
Housekeeping
Voice Concierge
WhatsApp Concierge
Night Auditor
Sales
Collections
Owner Digest
Custom

fields.description: Off pauses this agent without deleting it — scheduled runs skip, webhooks return 503, event calls short-circuit.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Leave blank for a chain/global agent that spans every property this user can see.
fields.label: Property

fields.description: Event: fires when a human calls it (AssistantPanel, ⌘K). Cron: scheduled. Webhook: inbound message wakes it (voice, WhatsApp).
fields.label: Trigger Type

fields.description: Standard 5-field crontab. Example: '0 6,18 * * *' for 6am and 6pm daily.
fields.label: Schedule (cron)

fields.description: HMAC secret used by the channel provider to sign inbound webhooks.
fields.label: Webhook Secret

fields.description: Free-form. e.g. claude-sonnet-4-7, claude-opus-4-7, claude-haiku-4-5, gpt-5, gemini-2.5-pro, or a local Ollama model id.
fields.label: Model

fields.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave blank to inherit from AI Assistant Settings for this property.
fields.label: Base URL

fields.description: Per-agent API key. Blank falls back to AI Assistant Settings.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: System prompt appended to the base MCP instructions. Give the agent a voice, priorities, and hard constraints.
fields.label: System Prompt

fields.description: Explicit list of whitelisted API method names this agent may call. Empty list = read-only agent (no tool calls at all).
fields.label: Tools

fields.description: Per action_type: Full runs immediately, Suggest returns a draft only, Approve parks the action in the Inbox for a human. Any action_type not listed defaults to Full.
fields.label: Autonomy Rules

fields.description: User who receives approval requests when this agent's autonomy resolves to Approve. Falls back to the property's Hotel Admin if blank.
fields.label: Default Approver
